zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Leigh of Margaret Roding於1415年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵時，他的父親Thomas de Leigh20歲，母親Lady Alice Butler32歲。他和Joan Holcroft至少有6個兒子和8個女兒。他去世於1509年4月23日享年94歲。

nameMeanings.name: Leigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

variants.name: Leah
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 李 and 利, see   Li   1 and 3.

variants.name: Lee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sang, Jae, Jong, Jung, Sung, Yong, Kyung, Seung, Dong, Kwang, Myung.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a meadow or a patch of arable land, Middle English lee, lea, from Old English lēa, dative case (used after a preposition) of lēah, which originally meant ‘wood or glade’.

English: habitational name from any of the many places in England named with Old English lēah ‘wood, glade’, including Lee in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Kent, and Shropshire, and Lea in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Wiltshire.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Leigh of Margaret Roding was born in 1415, in Addington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Leigh, was 20 and his mother, Lady Alice Butler, was 32. He had at least 6 sons and 8 daughters with Joan Holcroft. He died on 23 April 1509, at the age of 94.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Leigh of Margaret Rodingが1415年にイギリスイギリススリーアッドイントンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Leighは20歳，母Lady Alice Butlerは32歳であった。彼はJoan Holcroftとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘をもうけた。彼は1509年4月23日に94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Leigh of Margaret Roding(이)가 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 애딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Leigh(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Butler(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Joan Holcroft(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1509년 4월 23일 94세의 나이로 사망했다.
